old_value: {"id":"smallhold-naww.24","title":"posting.rs: self-mention generates spurious notification and push","description":"File: src/posting.rs:1037-1070. When a user mentions themselves in a post (e.g., @alice posts 'Hello @alice'), the code creates both a DB notification and a push notification to the same user. The favourite and reblog paths correctly guard with 'post.account_id \\!= auth.account_id' before notifying, but the local mention path at line 1037 has no such guard. Should add 'if aid \\!= auth.account_id' before inserting the notification and spawning the push.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:41:34.102655214Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T22:41:34.102655214Z","labels":["correctness","review"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"smallhold-naww.24","depends_on_id":"smallhold-naww","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T22:41:34.134179397Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
